scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npx firebase emulators:start --only auth,firestore,functions,hosting"
scripts.dev-persistent: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npx firebase emulators:start --only auth,firestore,functions,hosting --import=./firebase-data --export-on-exit --force"
scripts.clear-persistent: printf 'WARNING: This will delete all saved Firebase emulator data. Continue? (y/N) '; read ans; case "$ans" in [yY]*) rm -rf firebase-data && echo 'Data cleared.' ;; *) echo 'Aborted.' ;; esac
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix functions
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run test:unit --prefix frontend
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:chromium && npm run test:e2e:firefox
scripts.test:e2e:chromium: mkdir -p frontend/playwright-report/chromium frontend/test-results/chromium && docker build -t letusmeet-e2e -f Dockerfile.e2e . && docker run --rm -e CI -e VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID -e VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID -e VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY -v ~/.cache/firebase/emulators:/root/.cache/firebase/emulators -v $(pwd)/frontend/playwright-report/chromium:/app/frontend/playwright-report -v $(pwd)/frontend/test-results/chromium:/app/frontend/test-results letusmeet-e2e npx firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions,hosting "npm run test:e2e --prefix frontend -- --project=chromium"
scripts.test:e2e:firefox: mkdir -p frontend/playwright-report/firefox frontend/test-results/firefox && docker build -t letusmeet-e2e -f Dockerfile.e2e . && docker run --rm -e CI -e VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID -e VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID -e VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY -v ~/.cache/firebase/emulators:/root/.cache/firebase/emulators -v $(pwd)/frontend/playwright-report/firefox:/app/frontend/playwright-report -v $(pwd)/frontend/test-results/firefox:/app/frontend/test-results letusmeet-e2e npx firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions,hosting "npm run test:e2e --prefix frontend -- --project=firefox"
scripts.test:e2e:webkit: mkdir -p frontend/playwright-report/webkit frontend/test-results/webkit && docker build -t letusmeet-e2e -f Dockerfile.e2e . && docker run --rm -e CI -e VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID -e VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID -e VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY -v ~/.cache/firebase/emulators:/root/.cache/firebase/emulators -v $(pwd)/frontend/playwright-report/webkit:/app/frontend/playwright-report -v $(pwd)/frontend/test-results/webkit:/app/frontend/test-results letusmeet-e2e npx firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions,hosting "npm run test:e2e --prefix frontend -- --project=webkit"
scripts.test:e2e:local: npx firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions,hosting "npm run test:e2e --prefix frontend"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx firebase deploy --project letusmeet-6f4e1 --only hosting,firestore,auth,functions
